response:
<<Microsoft AI Ethics>>
Section 1
Microsoft values trust.
Trust builds strong bonds.
Bonds connect global teams.
Teams work hard daily.
Daily work creates value.
Value helps everyone grow.
Grow means learning more.
More knowledge aids progress.
Progress drives future goals.
Goals guide our path.
Section 2
Ethics guide our choices.
Choices shape our world.
World needs fair rules.
Rules ensure safe use.
Use requires clear terms.
Terms define user rights.
Rights protect human dignity.
Dignity matters most always.
Always check for bias.
Bias harms vulnerable groups.
Section 3
AI systems need checks.
Checks prevent bad outcomes.
Outcomes affect real lives.
Lives depend on safety.
Safety is key now.
Now we build tools.
Tools must be fair.
Fairness ensures equal access.
Access opens new doors.
Doors lead to hope.
Section 4
Hope inspires bright futures.
Futures hold great promise.
Promise demands high standards.
Standards require strict review.
Review finds hidden flaws.
Flaws can hurt users.
Users deserve honest tech.
Tech should help all.
All people share earth.
Earth needs caring minds.
Section 5
Minds create smart code.
Code runs on servers.
Servers store vast data.
Data needs strong protection.
Protection stops data theft.
Theft violates user trust.
Trust is fragile glass.
Glass breaks if dropped.
Dropped items cause harm.
Harm must be avoided.
Section 6
Avoiding harm takes time.
Time allows deep study.
Study reveals complex issues.
Issues need smart solutions.
Solutions require open debate.
Debate brings new ideas.
Ideas spark innovation fast.
Fast growth needs care.
Care prevents reckless moves.
Moves should be wise.
Section 7
Wise moves build legacy.
Legacy lasts for years.
Years bring many changes.
Changes test our resolve.
Resolve keeps us steady.
Steady hands guide ships.
Ships sail through storms.
Storms challenge our resolve.
Resolve strengthens our team.
Team works as one.
Section 8
One goal unites us.
Us means every person.
Person has unique voice.
Voice speaks to truth.
Truth guides our path.
